agents.noMatch: No agents match the selected tier filter.

home.subtitle: AI Swarm Control Center — start a new chat or continue a previous conversation.
home.noChats: No chats yet. Start a new conversation!

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls response creativity. Lower values produce focused, deterministic output. Higher values increase variety and exploration.

maxTokens.title: Max Output Tokens
maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens the model can generate per response. Higher values allow longer, more detailed answers.

maxIterations.title: Agent Iterations
maxIterations.description: How many tool-call rounds the agent can perform per request. Higher values let agents complete complex tasks autonomously.

completionSound.title: Completion Sound
completionSound.description: Play a chime and show a toast when the AI finishes generating a response.

oauth.title: Anthropic OAuth (MAX Plan)
oauth.bannerDesc: Get flat-rate API access with no per-token charges.

benefits.securePkce: Secure PKCE flow (no secrets in browser)

oauth.waitingDesc: Complete authentication on claude.ai, then paste the callback URL below.
oauth.loginSuccess: Successfully connected to Claude MAX Plan!
oauth.invalidUrl: Invalid callback URL. Paste the full URL from the browser.
oauth.popupBlocked: Popup blocked — click the link below to authenticate.

googleAuth.upgradeToOAuth: Sign in with your Google account to use your plan instead of the API key:
